description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and large, grid-patterned windows on all visible sides. The exterior walls are finished in a gray material, possibly concrete or stone, giving it a contemporary urban appearance. The house features an open-plan interior visible through the windows, with minimalistic furnishings and potted plants. The main entryway is located at the front, marked by a simple door and a small set of steps, flanked by large windows. The property is landscaped with a few medium-sized deciduous trees and scattered flower beds, enhancing its residential character. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large grid windows, and a gray exterior, surrounded by trees and flower beds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, additional windows, and three trees around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with multiple windows and visible interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the flat roof, side windows, and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid-patterned windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with small steps, no porch, flanked by large windows and minimal decorative elements
